description: Implement the ship repair milestone system. The player collects specific salvage components during runs to repair ship systems (Scanner Array, Fabricator, Comms Array, Engine). Each repair unlocks new capabilities and the engine repair is the win condition.
acceptance_criteria: Three ship systems are repairable in MVP: Scanner Array, Fabricator, and Engine Parts.
Each system requires a specific rare salvage item found in specific sectors (e.g., Engine Parts in Engineering sector).
Given the player returns to the ship with a repair component, when they interact with the ship system, then the repair is applied and the system activates.
Repairing the Scanner Array reveals sector hazard info (enemy types, power state) on the sector selection screen before entry.
Repairing the Fabricator allows the player to craft one basic starting weapon from scrap materials at the start of each run.
Repairing the Engine triggers the win condition — a victory screen displays with run statistics and total runs taken.
Repair progress persists across runs (same persistence mechanism as the airlock stash).
notes: Spec: 'Repairing the ship IS the win condition.' This gives the game a clear victory goal that Xenomarine lacked. 3 repair milestones for MVP (spec says 3).
